mapper.select: SELECT FLIGHT_ID AS flightId, AIRLINE AS airline, DEPARTURE AS departure, ARRIVAL AS arrival, FLIGHT_TYPE AS flightType, DEPART_TIME AS departTime, ARRIVE_TIME AS arriveTime, DURATION AS duration, PRICE AS price, SEAT_CLASS AS seatClass, FLIGHT_DATE AS flightDate FROM TRV_FLIGHT WHERE FLIGHT_ID = #{flightId}
